allow: PowerShell($raw = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\(\(Resolve-Path "deck-stage.js"\)\); "Has CRLF: $\($raw.Contains\("`r`n"\)\)"; "Has lone LF: $\(\(\($raw -split "`n"\).Count\) -gt 1\)"; "Count onKey bind: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($raw,[regex]::Escape\("this._onKey = this._onKey.bind\(this\);"\)\)\).Count\)"; "Count keydown add: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($raw,[regex]::Escape\("window.addEventListener\('keydown', this._onKey\);"\)\)\).Count\)"; "Count keydown remove: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($raw,[regex]::Escape\("window.removeEventListener\('keydown', this._onKey\);"\)\)\).Count\)"; "Count advance def: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($raw,[regex]::Escape\("_advance\(dir, reason = 'api'\) {"\)\)\).Count\)")
